{{Quote|You are the Lady Vader. The ''Mal'ary'ush'' of the Lord Vader. You will succeed at whatever goal you set for yourself.|Mobvekhar, to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Mobvekhar''' was a member of [[Clan Hakh'khar]] who was one of the members of the honor guard of the ''[[Mal'ary'ush]]''.

==Biography==
[[File:Mobvekhar-TLC5.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Mobvekhar is alerted to Councilor Fey'lya's presence]]
Mobvekhar first arrived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] as the second-in-command to [[Cakhmaim]] and leader of the second watch.

While guarding [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], he captured Councilor [[Borsk Fey'lya]] listening in on a conversation between Leia and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] chief [[Talon Karrde]]. He later accompanied Leia and Talon to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] in the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' in order to aid [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in destroying [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] facility in [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]]. While infiltrating the mountain, Mobvekhar and another Noghri held off a squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], allowing Leia and Talon the chance to reach the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] throne room.

By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he had been transplanted to Wayland and was attached to the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] safe house in [[New Nystao]].
